::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)

raw_data <- read_csv("data/raw_export.csv")

clean_data <- raw_data |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_trim)) |>
  distinct()
```
:::
